title: Greedy Algorithms and Exchange Arguments
description: Allocate rooms, bandwidth, and deadlines under competing local choices. Learners cumulatively produce a greedy-design decision and proof notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define a locally optimal choice and the remaining subproblem precisely.
Distinguish optimal substructure from the stronger greedy-choice property.
Transform an optimal solution to include the greedy choice without worsening it.
